originalTitle: Dominion Energy (D) Stock Sinks As Market Gains: What You Should Know
summary: The latest trading day saw Dominion Energy (D) settling at $68.29, representing a -1.29% change from its previous close.
content:
In the latest trading session, Dominion Energy (D) closed at $68.29, marking a -1.29% move from the previous day. The stock trailed the S&P 500, which registered a daily gain of 0.79%. Elsewhere, the Dow gained 0.26%, while the tech-heavy Nasdaq added 1.52%.

The energy company's shares have seen an increase of 7.07% over the last month, surpassing the Utilities sector's gain of 2.96% and the S&P 500's loss of 1.82%.

The investment community will be paying close attention to the earnings performance of Dominion Energy in its upcoming release. The company is expected to report EPS of $0.78, up 4% from the prior-year quarter. In the meantime, our current consensus estimate forecasts the revenue to be $3.91 billion, indicating a 2.5% growth compared to the corresponding quarter of the prior year.

Looking at the full year, the Zacks Consensus Estimates suggest analysts are expecting earnings of $3.59 per share and revenue of $17.73 billion. These totals would mark changes of +4.97% and +7.39%, respectively, from last year.

Investors should also pay attention to any latest changes in analyst estimates for Dominion Energy. These revisions typically reflect the latest short-term business trends, which can change frequently. Therefore, positive revisions in estimates convey analysts' confidence in the business performance and profit potential.

Empirical research indicates that these revisions in estimates have a direct correlation with impending stock price performance. To exploit this, we've formed the Zacks Rank, a quantitative model that includes these estimate changes and presents a viable rating system.

The Zacks Rank system, ranging from #1 (Strong Buy) to #5 (Strong Sell), possesses a remarkable history of outdoing, externally audited, with #1 stocks returning an average annual gain of +25% since 1988. Over the last 30 days, the Zacks Consensus EPS estimate has witnessed an unchanged state. Dominion Energy presently features a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold).

Looking at its valuation, Dominion Energy is holding a Forward P/E ratio of 19.25. This expresses a premium compared to the average Forward P/E of 18.44 of its industry.

The Utility - Electric Power industry is part of the Utilities sector. Currently, this industry holds a Zacks Industry Rank of 80, positioning it in the top 33% of all 250+ industries.

The Zacks Industry Rank assesses the strength of our separate industry groups by calculating the average Zacks Rank of the individual stocks contained within the groups. Our research shows that the top 50% rated industries outperform the bottom half by a factor of 2 to 1.

Remember to apply Zacks.com to follow these and more stock-moving metrics during the upcoming trading sessions.

chineseTitle: Dominion Energy (D) 股票随着市场上涨而下跌：您应该知道什么
chineseSummary: 最新交易日，Dominion Energy (D) 收于 68.29 美元，较前收盘价上涨 -1.29%。
chineseContent:
在最新的交易日中，Dominion Energy (D) 收于 68.29 美元，较前一交易日上涨 -1.29%。该股落后于标准普尔 500 指数，后者日涨幅为 0.79%。其他方面，道指上涨 0.26%，而以科技股为主的纳斯达克指数上涨 1.52%。

这家能源公司的股价上个月上涨了 7.07%，超过了公用事业板块 2.96% 的涨幅和标准普尔 500 指数 1.82% 的跌幅。

投资界将密切关注Dominion Energy即将发布的盈利表现。该公司预计每股收益为 0.78 美元，比去年同期增长 4%。与此同时，我们目前的共识预测收入为 39.1 亿美元，比去年同期增长 2.5%。

纵观全年，Zacks 一致估计表明分析师预计每股收益为 3.59 美元，收入为 177.3 亿美元。这些总数较去年分别增加了+4.97%和+7.39%。

投资者还应关注分析师对 Dominion Energy 预测的最新变化。这些修订通常反映最新的短期业务趋势，这些趋势可能经常变化。因此，预测的积极修正传达了分析师对业务业绩和利润潜力的信心。

实证研究表明，这些预测的修正与即将到来的股价表现直接相关。为了利用这一点，我们形成了 Zacks Rank，这是一个定量模型，其中包括这些估计变化并提供了一个可行的评级系统。

Zacks Rank 系统的范围从#1（强力买入）到#5（强力卖出），拥有卓越的超越历史，经过外部审计，自 1988 年以来#1 股票的平均年涨幅为 +25%。在过去 30 天里，Zacks 共识每股收益估计保持不变。 Dominion Energy 目前的 Zacks 排名为#3（持有）。

从估值来看，Dominion Energy 的远期市盈率为 19.25。与行业平均远期市盈率 18.44 相比，这存在溢价。

公用事业 - 电力行业是公用事业部门的一部分。目前，该行业的 Zacks 行业排名为 80，在所有 250 多个行业中排名前 33%。

Zacks 行业排名通过计算各行业组中包含的个股的平均 Zacks 排名来评估我们各个行业组的实力。我们的研究表明，排名前 50% 的行业的表现比排名后一半的行业高出 2 比 1。

请记住在即将到来的交易时段应用 Zacks.com 来跟踪这些以及更多的股票变动指标。
